title: Benchmark Email Review 2025: Features, Pricing & Honest Verdict
meta_description: Is Benchmark Email worth it in 2025? We break down pricing, features, pros and cons so you can decide.
h1: Benchmark Email Review 2025: Everything You Need to Know
intro: Benchmark Email is simple email marketing for growing businesses that positions itself for small businesses wanting an easy-to-use email platform. Founded in 2004, it has become one of the most recognised platforms in the email marketing space. In this review we cover what it does well, where it falls short, and who should actually use it.
verdict: Benchmark Email is a solid choice for small businesses wanting an easy-to-use email platform. Its free tier is genuinely useful. The main trade-off is between its particular strengths and the limitations that make alternatives worth considering for some users.
pros: Good fit for small businesses wanting an easy-to-use email platform
cons: Can get expensive at higher subscriber counts
Some features locked to higher tiers
pricing_summary: Benchmark Email offers a free plan, with paid plans from $13/month. Pricing typically scales with subscriber count.
best_for_detail: Benchmark Email works best for small businesses wanting an easy-to-use email platform. If you fit that profile, the feature set aligns well.

faq.a: Yes, Benchmark Email has a free plan supporting up to 500 subscribers.

faq.q: What is Benchmark Email best used for?
faq.a: Benchmark Email is best for small businesses wanting an easy-to-use email platform. Its standout features include drag-drop editor, automation, landing pages.

faq.q: Is Benchmark Email good for beginners?
Does Benchmark Email have an affiliate program?
faq.a: Yes, Benchmark Email runs an affiliate program paying 25% recurring.
